turnOff() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Device
This method turns off device.

turnOff(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.ActiveState
turns off device, changes state to Off.
turnOff(Device) - Method in interface cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.DeviceState
turns off device, changes state to Off.
turnOff(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.IdleState
Turns off device, changes state to Off.
turnOff(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.OffState
This method does nothing for OffState.
turnOn() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Device
This method turns on device.
turnOn() - Method in interface cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.DeviceOperationsApi
 
turnOn(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.ActiveState
This method does nothing for ActiveState.
turnOn(Device) - Method in interface cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.DeviceState
This method does nothing for ActiveState.
turnOn(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.IdleState
This method does nothing for IdleState.
turnOn(Device) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates.OffState
turns on device, changes state to IDLE.
TV - Class in cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices
This class represents tv.
